text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking around the central plaza when I notice
Bamboo Memory holding her head.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... Actually, I reread the school rules
yesterday.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I don't mean to brag, but... I memorized all
of them!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
As chair of the disciplinary committee, it's my
duty to memorize them word-for-word! It's just...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I tried to memorize them again—just to be sure!
So I read the rules over and over... and after a
while, my head started feeling worse and worse...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But there's nothing to worry about. A little
headache is nothing for the disciplinary
committee ch—

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yooowch!
Ugh... Gotta... get it together...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory's headache persists for some
time.
